title: BEM-543 corrected curator orchestrator test
objective:
Run script:
"""
base = Path('governance/internal_contour/tests/bem543')
base.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
reports = Path('governance/reports')
reports.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
proofs = Path('governance/codex/proofs')
proofs.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
transport = Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl')
transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
role_state_path = Path('governance/state/role_cycle_state.json')
contour_status_path = Path('governance/state/contour_status.json')
roadmap = Path('governance/tasks/done/BEM543_CORRECTED_CURATOR_ORCHESTRATOR_TEST.md')
roadmap.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
cycle = 'bem543-corrected-curator-orchestrator-test'

# 1. External task enters only through curator.
curator_intake = {
  'record_type': 'curator_intake',
  'cycle_id': cycle,
  'trace_id': 'bem543_corrected_input_001',
  'source': 'gpt',
  'task_type': 'development',
  'title': 'Corrected practical orchestrator chain',
  'objective': 'Verify explicit curator assignment before analyst role execution.',
  'status': 'completed',
  'artifact_path': 'governance/internal_contour/tests/bem543/curator_intake.json',
  'blocker': None,
  'created_at': '2026-05-17 | 14:19 (UTC+3)'
}
(base/'curator_intake.json').write_text(json.dumps(curator_intake, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')

# 2. Curator explicitly validates and assigns to role-orchestrator.
curator_assignment = {
  'record_type': 'curator_assignment',
  'cycle_id': cycle,
  'source': 'internal_curator',
  'from_role': 'curator',
  'to_role': 'role_orchestrator',
  'status': 'completed',
  'decision': 'submit_to_orchestrator',
  'reason': 'external_task_validated_by_curator',
  'artifact_path': 'governance/internal_contour/tests/bem543/curator_assignment.json',
  'commit_sha': None,
  'blocker': None,
  'created_at': '2026-05-17 | 14:19 (UTC+3)'
}
(base/'curator_assignment.json').write_text(json.dumps(curator_assignment, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')

with transport.open('a', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    f.write(json.dumps(curator_intake, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')
    f.write(json.dumps(curator_assignment, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')

# Helpers: orchestrator reads latest cycle record and decides the next role. Curator is explicit first.
def cycle_records():
    out=[]
    for line in transport.read_text(errors='ignore').splitlines():
        if not line.strip():
            continue
        try:
            r=json.loads(line)
        except Exception:
            continue
        if r.get('cycle_id')==cycle:
            out.append(r)
    return out

def latest_curator_intake():
    records = cycle_records()
    for r in records[::-1]:
        if r.get('record_type') == 'curator_intake':
            return r
    return {}

def decide(latest):
    rt = latest.get('record_type')
    intake = latest_curator_intake()
    task_type = intake.get('task_type')
    if rt == 'curator_assignment':
        if task_type == 'development':
            return ('analyst','curator_assigned_development_task_to_orchestrator')
        if task_type == 'audit':
            return ('auditor','curator_assigned_audit_task_to_orchestrator')
        if task_type == 'hotfix':
            return ('auditor','curator_assigned_hotfix_to_auditor_first')
        return ('curator','unknown_task_type_return_to_curator')
    if rt == 'analysis' and latest.get('status') == 'completed':
        return ('auditor','analysis_completed_requires_audit')
    if rt == 'audit' and latest.get('decision') == 'PASS_TO_EXECUTOR':
        return ('executor','audit_pass_to_executor')
    if rt == 'execution' and latest.get('status') == 'completed':
        return ('auditor_final','execution_completed_requires_final_audit')
    if rt == 'audit' and latest.get('decision') == 'FINAL_PASS':
        return ('curator_closure','final_audit_pass_returns_to_curator')
    return ('curator','default_to_curator')

def append_record(rec):
    with transport.open('a', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        f.write(json.dumps(rec, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')

steps=[]
closed=False
for i in range(1, 10):
    latest = cycle_records()[-1]
    next_role, reason = decide(latest)
    decision = {
      'record_type':'role_orchestrator_decision',
      'cycle_id':cycle,
      'source':'internal_orchestrator',
      'from_role':'role_orchestrator',
      'to_role':next_role,
      'status':'completed',
      'decision':'route_to_' + next_role,
      'reason':reason,
      'input_record_type':latest.get('record_type'),
      'artifact_path':'governance/internal_contour/tests/bem543/orchestrator_decision_' + str(i) + '.json',
      'commit_sha':None,
      'blocker':None,
      'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 14:19 (UTC+3)'
    }
    (base/('orchestrator_decision_' + str(i) + '.json')).write_text(json.dumps(decision, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')
    append_record(decision)
    steps.append({'step':i,'input_record_type':latest.get('record_type'),'decision':next_role,'reason':reason})

    if next_role == 'analyst':
        p = base/'analyst_plan.md'
        p.write_text('# BEM-543 Analyst Plan\n\nCreated only after curator_assignment and role_orchestrator_decision routed to analyst.\n')
        append_record({'record_type':'analysis','cycle_id':cycle,'source':'internal','from_role':'analyst','to_role':'role_orchestrator','status':'completed','artifact_path':str(p),'commit_sha':None,'blocker':None,'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 14:19 (UTC+3)'})
    elif next_role == 'auditor':
        p = base/'auditor_review.md'
        p.write_text('# BEM-543 Auditor Review\n\nPASS_TO_EXECUTOR after analyst plan.\n')
        append_record({'record_type':'audit','cycle_id':cycle,'source':'internal','from_role':'auditor','to_role':'role_orchestrator','status':'completed','decision':'PASS_TO_EXECUTOR','artifact_path':str(p),'commit_sha':None,'blocker':None,'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 14:19 (UTC+3)'})
    elif next_role == 'executor':
        p = base/'executor_artifact.md'
        p.write_text('# BEM-543 Executor Artifact\n\nCreated after curator -> orchestrator -> analyst -> auditor PASS_TO_EXECUTOR.\n')
        append_record({'record_type':'execution','cycle_id':cycle,'source':'internal','from_role':'executor','to_role':'role_orchestrator','status':'completed','artifact_path':str(p),'commit_sha':None,'blocker':None,'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 14:19 (UTC+3)'})
    elif next_role == 'auditor_final':
        p = base/'final_audit.md'
        p.write_text('# BEM-543 Final Audit\n\nFINAL_PASS after executor artifact exists.\n')
        append_record({'record_type':'audit','cycle_id':cycle,'source':'internal','from_role':'auditor','to_role':'role_orchestrator','status':'completed','decision':'FINAL_PASS','artifact_path':str(p),'commit_sha':None,'blocker':None,'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 14:19 (UTC+3)'})
    elif next_role == 'curator_closure':
        p = base/'curator_closure.md'
        p.write_text('# BEM-543 Curator Closure\n\nCycle closed by curator after role_orchestrator observed FINAL_PASS.\n')
        append_record({'record_type':'final_result','cycle_id':cycle,'source':'internal','from_role':'curator','to_role':'external_gpt','status':'completed','artifact_path':str(p),'commit_sha':None,'blocker':None,'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 14:19 (UTC+3)'})
        closed=True
        break
    else:
        break

expected = ['analyst','auditor','executor','auditor_final','curator_closure']
actual = [s['decision'] for s in steps]
full_visible_sequence = ['external_gpt','curator','role_orchestrator'] + actual
ok = closed and actual == expected
blocker = None if ok else {'code':'BEM543_SEQUENCE_FAILED','actual':actual,'expected':expected,'closed':closed}

# Update BEM-542 report with erratum if present.
bem542_report = Path('governance/reports/bem542_real_internal_orchestrator_test_report.md')
if bem542_report.exists():
    txt = bem542_report.read_text(errors='ignore')
    if '## Erratum BEM-543' not in txt:
        txt += '\n\n## Erratum BEM-543\nBEM-542 summary omitted the explicit initial curator assignment. Correct full sequence is: external GPT -> curator intake -> curator assignment -> role-orchestrator -> analyst -> auditor -> executor -> auditor_final -> curator closure. See `governance/reports/bem543_corrected_curator_orchestrator_test_report.md`.\n'
        bem542_report.write_text(txt)
        changed_files.append(str(bem542_report))

role_state_path = Path('governance/state/role_cycle_state.json')
state = json.loads(role_state_path.read_text()) if role_state_path.exists() else {}
state['cycle_id'] = cycle
state['updated_at'] = '2026-05-17 | 14:19 (UTC+3)'
state['curator_status'] = 'CLOSED' if ok else 'BLOCKED'
state['active_role'] = 'curator'
state['next_role'] = None
state['current_task'] = {'id':'BEM-543','title':'Corrected curator -> orchestrator -> analyst test','status':'completed' if ok else 'blocked'}
state['blocker'] = blocker
hist = state.get('history', [])
if not isinstance(hist, list): hist=[hist]
hist.append({'at':'2026-05-17 | 14:19 (UTC+3)','event':'BEM-543 corrected full sequence with explicit curator assignment','status':'PASS' if ok else 'BLOCKER','sequence':full_visible_sequence})
state['history'] = hist
role_state_path.write_text(json.dumps(state, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')

contour_status_path = Path('governance/state/contour_status.json')
contour = json.loads(contour_status_path.read_text()) if contour_status_path.exists() else {}
contour['updated_at'] = '2026-05-17 | 14:19 (UTC+3)'
contour['last_corrected_curator_orchestrator_test'] = {'id':'BEM-543','status':'PASS' if ok else 'BLOCKER','full_sequence':full_visible_sequence,'blocker':blocker}
contour['last_result'] = 'BEM-543 corrected curator/orchestrator sequence ' + ('PASS' if ok else 'BLOCKER')
contour['blocker'] = blocker
contour_status_path.write_text(json.dumps(contour, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')

roadmap.write_text('# BEM-543 | Corrected Curator -> Orchestrator -> Analyst Test | ' + ('PASS' if ok else 'BLOCKER') + '\n\nДата: 2026-05-17 | 14:19 (UTC+3)\n\n## Result\nCorrected sequence test completed.\n\n## Full sequence\n' + ' -> '.join(full_visible_sequence) + '\n\n## Blocker\n' + ('null' if ok else json.dumps(blocker, ensure_ascii=False)) + '\n')

report = reports/'bem543_corrected_curator_orchestrator_test_report.md'
report.write_text('# BEM-543 | Corrected Curator -> Orchestrator -> Analyst Test | ' + ('PASS' if ok else 'BLOCKER') + '\n\nДата: 2026-05-17 | 14:19 (UTC+3)\n\n## Почему тест нужен\nВ BEM-542 в кратком отчёте была указана последовательность начиная с analyst. Это неполно: analyst не стартует сам. Сначала curator принимает задачу и передаёт её в role-orchestrator, а уже orchestrator назначает analyst.\n\n## Полная корректная последовательность\n| Шаг | Событие | Артефакт | Обоснование |\n|---|---|---|---|\n| 1 | external GPT -> curator intake | `curator_intake.json` | Внешний контур входит только через curator |\n| 2 | curator -> role_orchestrator | `curator_assignment.json` | Куратор валидирует задачу и передаёт её оркестратору |\n| 3 | role_orchestrator -> analyst | `orchestrator_decision_1.json` | task_type=development требует анализа |\n| 4 | analyst -> role_orchestrator | `analyst_plan.md` | Аналитик создаёт план |\n| 5 | role_orchestrator -> auditor | `orchestrator_decision_2.json` | analysis completed требует audit |\n| 6 | auditor -> role_orchestrator | `auditor_review.md` | Auditor даёт PASS_TO_EXECUTOR |\n| 7 | role_orchestrator -> executor | `orchestrator_decision_3.json` | Audit PASS ведёт к executor |\n| 8 | executor -> role_orchestrator | `executor_artifact.md` | Executor создаёт artifact |\n| 9 | role_orchestrator -> auditor_final | `orchestrator_decision_4.json` | Execution требует final audit |\n| 10 | auditor_final -> role_orchestrator | `final_audit.md` | FINAL_PASS |\n| 11 | role_orchestrator -> curator_closure | `orchestrator_decision_5.json` | Final audit PASS возвращает цикл куратору |\n| 12 | curator closure -> external GPT | `curator_closure.md` | Куратор закрывает цикл |\n\n## Orchestrator decisions\n```json\n' + json.dumps(steps, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False) + '\n```\n\n## Вывод\nКорректная модель подтверждена: analyst появляется только после curator intake, curator assignment и role-orchestrator decision.\n\n## Blocker\n' + ('null' if ok else json.dumps(blocker, ensure_ascii=False)) + '\n')
proof = proofs/'bem543_corrected_curator_orchestrator_test.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-543 ' + ('PASS' if ok else 'BLOCKER') + ': corrected sequence=' + '->'.join(full_visible_sequence) + '\n')

changed_files.extend([str(base/'curator_intake.json'), str(base/'curator_assignment.json'), str(transport), str(role_state_path), str(contour_status_path), str(roadmap), str(report), str(proof)])
for p in base.iterdir():
    if p.name.startswith('orchestrator_decision_') or p.name in ['analyst_plan.md','auditor_review.md','executor_artifact.md','final_audit.md','curator_closure.md']:
        changed_files.append(str(p))
ops_applied.append('BEM-543 corrected curator -> role_orchestrator -> analyst sequence tested and BEM-542 report erratum added')
"""
No issue comments.
